name: tagfs
tagline: Tag-based virtual filesystem with a postfix query language.
blurb: Cross-platform FUSE/WinFsp filesystem that mounts tags as directories. AND/OR/NOT compose by walking deeper into operator subdirectories; the same postfix grammar drives the tag query box on this site.
note: The query grammar lives in src/lib/tagfs/ here, ported from the Rust implementation, so the URL syntax stays compatible.
